mission_name: HELM · Hoch Ecosystem Logic Matrix · Live Command
north_star_goal: Use HELM as the live orchestration, routing, verification, and command layer for HAS and all Hoch factories.
factories: CORE · Runtime, relay, orchestration, evidence, telemetry
current_objective: Align council orchestration, runtime architecture, cybersecurity Jira backlog, PERT planning, and execution daemons into one governed HELM command system.
non_negotiable_doctrine: Council may advise, but evidence promotes

council_assignments.task: Create the master mission graph, factory alignment, critical path, and final decision state.
Synthesize the overall architecture and convert it into an executive-operational plan.
Audit logic, evidence sufficiency, no-fake-green risks, and code/runtime implications.
Red-team assumptions, attack weak dependencies, and identify likely failure modes.
Fast alternate path analysis and bottleneck compression.
Deep reasoning, code block validation, and context verification.
Perform fast logical backstop assertions and query routing checks.
Identify what can be done locally, cheaply, offline, and without cloud dependency.
Convert approved plan into implementation-ready work packets and validation commands.
Generate cybersecurity, ConMon, SAST, dependency, and evidence ticket requirements.

jira_backlog.description: Establish formal ATO directory structures and documentation sets to support System Security Plan (SSP), Security Assessment Report (SAR), and Plan of Action and Milestones (POA&M) artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: ATO folders exist on disk for SSP, SAR, POA&M, risk assessments, and compliance scans.

jira_backlog.description: Define the physical and logical boundaries of the HELM and HAS environments, including local agents, VPS relays, cloud endpoints, and data flows.
acceptance_criteria: Boundary description maps all nodes, relays, and databases.
definition_of_done: boundary document verified by security scan

jira_backlog.description: Create a canonical, versioned index file listing all security authorization package elements and their active implementation posture.
acceptance_criteria: Index file maps all 10 NIST-aligned HELM security epics.
definition_of_done: Index populated with valid links and statuses

jira_backlog.description: Draft a risk assessment detailing model routing risks, key exposures, data leaks, and state drift threat mitigation.
acceptance_criteria: Risk matrix categorizes likelihood, impact, and mitigation strategy.
definition_of_done: Risk matrix completed and checked in

jira_backlog.description: Establish a live register for Plan of Action and Milestones (POA&M) to track open vulnerabilities, dependencies, and remediation milestones.
acceptance_criteria: POA&M register is machine-readable and maps to open Jira tasks.
definition_of_done: Register exists and passes json validation

jira_backlog.description: Develop and deploy the active Continuous Monitoring (ConMon) engine to aggregate security status, key validity, and daemon freshness.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint publishes structured JSON telemetry.

jira_backlog.description: Implement stale-data thresholds to mark outdated telemetry as STALE on the dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Data older than 60s is tagged STALE and blocks auto-loop advances.
definition_of_done: Unit tests check stale status flag

jira_backlog.description: Emit verified timestamp heartbeats from the local evidence ledger to the relay.
acceptance_criteria: Last verified heartbeat payload includes active ledger checksum.

jira_backlog.description: Feed live status metrics of all active 10-device swarm PIDs to the coordination console.
acceptance_criteria: All daemon process states (Active/Idle/Blocked) are visible in the API payload.
definition_of_done: Health payload renders on the console UI

jira_backlog.description: Integrate local SAST and dependency scan logs directly into the ConMon API feed.
acceptance_criteria: Latest scan timestamp and defect counts are appended to the payload.
definition_of_done: Scan summaries verified in status feed

jira_backlog.description: Establish a structured evidence schema in SQLite/JSON to track test outputs, checksums, and git commits.
acceptance_criteria: Ledger schema supports unique ticket keys, file hashes, and timestamps.

jira_backlog.summary: Add ledger entries for code changes
jira_backlog.description: Implement automated hooks to log every code modification, including file name, diff size, and test coverage results.
acceptance_criteria: Git commit hook logs diff statistics to the ledger.

jira_backlog.summary: Add ledger entries for security scans
jira_backlog.description: Automate security scanner logging to record SAST and dependency scan logs directly to the ledger.
acceptance_criteria: Gitleaks/npm audit run logs recorded with SHA-256 signatures.

jira_backlog.description: Build an execution check that parses the ledger and blocks tasks if required evidence files are missing.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks fail-closed if referenced evidence path returns 404 or hash drift is detected.

jira_backlog.description: Ensure all evidence paths listed in the ledger resolve to accessible files on the local disk or private Tailscale server.
acceptance_criteria: Resolver converts database paths to clickable links on the dashboard.
definition_of_done: Clickable files verified on dashboard interface

jira_backlog.description: Map all HELM and HAS functions to NIST SP 800-53 security control families, linking each to formal validation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Control mapping matrix maps at least 25 core security controls.
definition_of_done: Control mapping document created and signed off

jira_backlog.description: Draft AC family control narratives including model routing, least privilege roles, and API credential access.
acceptance_criteria: AC narratives detail enforcement of DOORSTEP policies.

jira_backlog.description: Draft AU family control narratives mapping inter-agent dialogue logging and evidence signature verification.
acceptance_criteria: AU narratives cover secure storage of the evidence ledger.

jira_backlog.description: Draft CM family control narratives detailing git baseline checks, drift detection, and Change-Board approval invariants.
acceptance_criteria: CM narratives map the baseline guard execution flow.

jira_backlog.description: Draft SI and RA family control narratives outlining vulnerability scans, patch windows, and POA&M prioritization.
acceptance_criteria: SI/RA narratives define the remediation loop timelines.

jira_backlog.summary: Establish software supply chain security gates
jira_backlog.description: Configure build-pipeline gates checking dependencies, third-party libraries, base images, and embedded secrets.
acceptance_criteria: Builds block automatically if any security gate fails.
definition_of_done: Pipeline gates verified in test execution

jira_backlog.description: Integrate Gitleaks secret scanner to block commits containing plaintext API keys or credentials.
acceptance_criteria: Gitleaks runs as a pre-commit hook.
definition_of_done: Commit hook intercepts dummy secret successfully

jira_backlog.description: Configure NPM audit and Pip audit checks to scan project package manifests.
acceptance_criteria: Any dependency vulnerability with severity High/Critical blocks the build.

jira_backlog.description: Incorporate Trivy scanner to audit Docker files and local project folders.
acceptance_criteria: Trivy scan outputs zero unmitigated CVEs in build image.

jira_backlog.description: Generate a SPDX-compliant Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for the deployed Story Studio and Epic Fury environments.
acceptance_criteria: SBOM lists all direct and transitive dependencies with licenses.

jira_backlog.summary: Define access control and secrets posture
jira_backlog.description: Establish formal credentials handling, Least Privilege matrices, and .env configuration validation rules.
acceptance_criteria: Gated policies enforce that no API key is written to chat.

jira_backlog.description: Implement code guards to detect attempts to request live credentials and route them to FOUNDER_GATE status.
acceptance_criteria: Credential provisioning requires a signed founder approval packet.
evidence_required: unit test confirming key gating block

jira_backlog.description: Document an inventory of all environment variable keys (without their values) required by the system.
acceptance_criteria: Template matches required project keys exactly.

jira_backlog.description: Build an automated validator to verify the format of keys set in local and VPS deployment environment files.
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails-closed and marks environment UNKNOWN if keys are missing.

jira_backlog.description: Map all 10-device swarm agents to their allowed read/write namespaces to enforce least privilege access.
acceptance_criteria: Agents are restricted from accessing folders outside their active sectors.
definition_of_done: Privilege matrix created and integrated into agent runner

jira_backlog.summary: Implement audit logging for HELM decisions
jira_backlog.description: Develop the logging fabric to output immutable, timestamped transaction trails of all Council deliberations.
acceptance_criteria: Decision logs include model responses, timestamps, and active baseline hashes.

jira_backlog.description: Automate recording of final aggregated Council verdicts (GO/BLOCKED/UNKNOWN/FOUNDER_GATE).
acceptance_criteria: Decisions are written to the audit log at the conclusion of each tick.

jira_backlog.description: Record all lane promotion actions, detailing the evidence matching that allowed promotion.
acceptance_criteria: Decisions log exact validation output and baseline references.
evidence_required: promotion entries verified in audit logs
definition_of_done: Promotion logic writes to log files

jira_backlog.description: Log all founder-gate actions, recording the signed approval filename and timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Gate logs detail approval ID, timestamp, and signed signature hash.
evidence_required: founder gate log entries in database
definition_of_done: Gate approvals log to audit trails

jira_backlog.description: Provide a script to bundle audit logs, evidence files, and baseline hashes into a zip archive.
acceptance_criteria: Export script generates standard zipped packages.

jira_backlog.description: Configure the security scanning triage process, converting parser findings into active POA&M elements.
acceptance_criteria: High/Critical vulnerabilities automatically map to the POA&M register.

jira_backlog.description: Write unified parser scripts to normalize outputs from Gitleaks, npm audit, and Trivy.
acceptance_criteria: Parser outputs standardized JSON summaries containing CVE/Severity.

jira_backlog.description: Build classification rules prioritizing findings by CVSS severity and ease of exploit.
acceptance_criteria: High severity findings default to P0 blockers.

jira_backlog.description: Automate creation of HCF-VM Jira tasks for any newly discovered High/Critical scanner findings.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks detail file path, finding code, and fix recommendations.

jira_backlog.description: Verify vulnerability remediation by executing a re-scan of the target file.
acceptance_criteria: Remediation requires 0 defects returned by the scanner.

jira_backlog.description: Establish formal incident response playbooks, defining triggers, containment options, and escalation pathways.
acceptance_criteria: Playbooks cover key leaks, server failures, and unauthorized modifications.
definition_of_done: Response plan created and signed off

jira_backlog.description: Build rules to classify security and operational incidents by severity (Severity 1 to Severity 4).
acceptance_criteria: Severity 1 incidents trigger immediate daemon halt.

jira_backlog.description: Integrate critical alert routing to dispatch mobile push notifications to the founder.
acceptance_criteria: Severity 1 alerts trigger instant push notifications via ntfy.

jira_backlog.description: Write specific containment markdown playbooks detailing steps to revoke compromised keys or isolate nodes.
acceptance_criteria: Playbooks include commands to disconnect Tailscale nodes.

jira_backlog.description: Provide a standard Post-Incident Review (PIR) template to document root causes, impacts, and remediation plans.
acceptance_criteria: Template prompts for root cause analysis and POA&M linkage.

jira_backlog.description: Develop a React/HTML panel displaying live security compliance, POA&M status, and ConMon metrics.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard panel displays in the HELM console interface.

jira_backlog.description: Add UI components mapping security control family compliance (GO/PARTIAL/UNKNOWN).
acceptance_criteria: Control family cards update dynamically based on the evidence ledger.

jira_backlog.description: Create a UI table to display open gaps, severities, remediation owners, and target dates.
acceptance_criteria: Table pulls dynamically from poam_register.json.

jira_backlog.description: Build the dashboard panel displaying live daemon states, heartbeats, and database persistence status.
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry status refreshes at 5s intervals.

jira_backlog.description: Add a button to download the consolidated compliance package directly from the dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the button triggers a download of the zipped audit export.
definition_of_done: Export button triggers file download successfully

jira_backlog.description: Develop and wire the core HELM logic matrix server supporting structured Council assignments, vote aggregation, and daemon work packets.
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app mounts the /api/helm/ endpoints successfully.
definition_of_done: Command server endpoints compile and pass tests

jira_backlog.description: Define the canonical JSON schema for HELM mission contexts, documenting non-negotiable doctrines and required outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Schema parses and validates structured context inputs.

jira_backlog.description: Implement the routing matrix dynamically assigning specific tasks to council members based on their roles.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks are dispatched to appropriate endpoints defined in the roster.

jira_backlog.description: Write code checks to verify that any 'GO' state has verified evidence, raising BLOCKED or UNKNOWN on missing proof.
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails-closed on fabricated stats or mock markers.

jira_backlog.description: Build logic to intercept any restricted actions (credential access, external deployments) and prompt for founder clearance.
acceptance_criteria: Restricted actions are written to founder_gate_register.json.

jira_backlog.description: Develop code to aggregate independent votes from active council members into a single, unified verdict.
acceptance_criteria: Verdict requires unanimous APPROVAL from active seats, else returns CONDITIONAL/REJECT.

jira_backlog.summary: Add execution daemon work packet schema
jira_backlog.description: Design the JSON schema for work packets sent to local Gordy/AG IDE execution daemons.
acceptance_criteria: Packets contain exact commands, cwd, validation parameters, and timeout thresholds.

jira_backlog.description: Create the API route emitting unified HELM command states, including active missions, critical paths, and open gates.
acceptance_criteria: API outputs JSON matching the dashboard data specifications.

jira_backlog.description: Implement telemetry monitoring to check if the coordination bus hasn't updated within expected intervals.
acceptance_criteria: No bus updates in 120s triggers STALE state and locks executions.
definition_of_done: State lock triggers in unit test

jira_backlog.description: Build an E2E verification script to run all HELM unit and integration checks prior to release.
acceptance_criteria: Script runs all tests and confirms 0 failures.

expected_outcome_state.reason: Mission alignment is defined, but implementation and validation evidence are still required.
expected_outcome_state.next_action: Create Jira backlog, HELM state contract, routing matrix, and verification script.
blocked_by: No verified Jira import/export evidence yet
No confirmed HELM runtime state endpoint yet
No verified cybersecurity evidence ledger yet
No council vote aggregation output yet
